lineage.Process: Append G:\GIS\GISServicesProject\Planning\9128ZoningParcelSync\02Data\ZoningParcelSync.mdb\Data\Zoning_New DBO.Zoning_Layer NO_TEST "d_Designation "d_Designation" true true false 6 Text 0 0 ,First,#,G:\GIS\GISServicesProject\Planning\9128ZoningParcelSync\02Data\ZoningParcelSync.mdb\Data\Zoning_New,d_Designation,-1,-1;ORDINANCE "ORDINANCE" true true false 20 Text 0 0 ,First,#,G:\GIS\GISServicesProject\Planning\9128ZoningParcelSync\02Data\ZoningParcelSync.mdb\Data\Zoning_New,ORDINANCE,-1,-1;UPDATED_ON "UPDATED_ON" true true false 36 Date 0 0 ,First,#,G:\GIS\GISServicesProject\Planning\9128ZoningParcelSync\02Data\ZoningParcelSync.mdb\Data\Zoning_New,UPDATED_ON,-1,-1;Constrained "Constrained" true true false 4 Text 0 0 ,First,#,G:\GIS\GISServicesProject\Planning\9128ZoningParcelSync\02Data\ZoningParcelSync.mdb\Data\Zoning_New,Constrained,-1,-1;d_Zone "d_Zone" true true false 6 Text 0 0 ,First,#,G:\GIS\GISServicesProject\Planning\9128ZoningParcelSync\02Data\ZoningParcelSync.mdb\Data\Zoning_New,d_Zone,-1,-1;Shape.area "Shape.area" false false true 0 Double 0 0 ,First,#;Shape.len "Shape.len" false false true 0 Double 0 0 ,First,#" #

AddField "Database Connections\RedmondGIS.sde\RedmondGIS.DBO.Cadastral\RedmondGIS.DBO.Zoning" CreatedBy TEXT # # 50 CreatedBy NULLABLE NON_REQUIRED #
AddField "Database Connections\RedmondGIS.sde\RedmondGIS.DBO.Cadastral\RedmondGIS.DBO.Zoning" DateCreated DATE # # # DateCreated NULLABLE NON_REQUIRED #
AddField "Database Connections\RedmondGIS.sde\RedmondGIS.DBO.Cadastral\RedmondGIS.DBO.Zoning" ModifiedBy TEXT # # 50 ModifiedBy NULLABLE NON_REQUIRED #
AddField "Database Connections\RedmondGIS.sde\RedmondGIS.DBO.Cadastral\RedmondGIS.DBO.Zoning" DateModified DATE # # # DateModified NULLABLE NON_REQUIRED #
EnableEditorTracking "Database Connections\RedmondGIS.sde\RedmondGIS.DBO.Cadastral\RedmondGIS.DBO.Zoning" CreatedBy DateCreated ModifiedBy DateModified ADD_FIELDS DATABASE_TIME

ExportFeatures RedmondGIS.DBO.Zoning G:\Planning\ZoningConsolidation\Data\Geodatabase\ZoningConsolidation\ZoningConsolidation.gdb\ZoningConsolidationPhase1 # NOT_USE_ALIAS "ORDINANCE "ORDINANCE" true true false 20 Text 0 0,First,#,RedmondGIS.DBO.Zoning,ORDINANCE,0,20;UPDATED_ON "UPDATED_ON" true true false 8 Date 0 0,First,#,RedmondGIS.DBO.Zoning,UPDATED_ON,-1,-1;Constrained "Constrained" true true false 4 Text 0 0,First,#,RedmondGIS.DBO.Zoning,Constrained,0,4;d_Zone "d_Zone" true true false 6 Text 0 0,First,#,RedmondGIS.DBO.Zoning,d_Zone,0,6;CreatedBy "CreatedBy" false true false 50 Text 0 0,First,#,RedmondGIS.DBO.Zoning,CreatedBy,0,50;DateCreated "DateCreated" false true false 8 Date 0 0,First,#,RedmondGIS.DBO.Zoning,DateCreated,-1,-1;ModifiedBy "ModifiedBy" false true false 50 Text 0 0,First,#,RedmondGIS.DBO.Zoning,ModifiedBy,0,50;DateModified "DateModified" false true false 8 Date 0 0,First,#,RedmondGIS.DBO.Zoning,DateModified,-1,-1;GlobalID "GlobalID" false false true 38 GlobalID 0 0,First,#,RedmondGIS.DBO.Zoning,GlobalID,-1,-1" #
CalculateField ZoningConsolidationPhase1 PrelimLandUse 'Overlake Mixed-Use' "Python 3" # Text NO_ENFORCE_DOMAINS
CalculateField ZoningConsolidationPhase1 NewZone 'Neighborhood Multifamily' "Python 3" # Text NO_ENFORCE_DOMAINS
CalculateField ZoningConsolidationPhase1 NewZone 'Neighborhood Residential' "Python 3" # Text NO_ENFORCE_DOMAINS

CalculateField Zoning RedZoningID SequentialNumber() "Python 3" "# Calculates a sequential number # More calculator examples at esriurl.com/CalculatorExamples rec=0 def SequentialNumber(): global rec pStart = 1 pInterval = 1 if (rec == 0): rec = pStart else: rec = rec + pInterval return rec" Text NO_ENFORCE_DOMAINS

idinfo.native: Microsoft Windows Vista Version 6.1 (Build 7601) Service Pack 1; ESRI ArcCatalog 9.3.1.4000

descript.abstract: The data set represents zoning designation boundaries for the City of Redmond. Zoning designations are indicated in the d_Designation attribute.
descript.purpose: The purpose of the data set is to identify zoning information for City of Redmond properties.
descript.supplinf: The date of the most recent City Council adoptions included in this data is 04/16/2011.

theme.themekt: REQUIRED: Reference to a formally registered thesaurus or a similar authoritative source of theme keywords.

idinfo.accconst: All access to the dataset will be as Read-Only.
idinfo.useconst: Distribution to the consultant and customers should be processed through the GIS Services Group, Finance and Information Services department. All requestors are required to fill a request form and sign disclaimer statement

dataIdInfo.envirDesc: Microsoft Windows Server 2016 Technical Preview Version 10.0 (Build 20348) ; Esri ArcGIS 13.3.0.51575
dataIdInfo.idPurp: The purpose of the layer is to identify the zoning classification of the City of Redmond's parcels.
dataIdInfo.idAbs: Redmond’s first zoning ordinance was established in 1940. This zoning layer represents a form of development regulation used to manage land use and development within the City of Redmond. It outlines zoning designation boundaries, with each designation indicated in the d_Zone attribute. The most recent City Council adoption reflected in this data is dated June 17, 2025.

Consts.useLimit:
While the data have been tested for accuracy and are properly functioning, the City of Redmond disclaims any responsibility for the accuracy or correctness of the data.

The foregoing warranty is exclusive and in lieu of all other warranties of merchantability, fitness for particular purpose and/or any other type whether expressed or implied.

In no event shall the City of Redmond become liable to users of these data, or any other party, for any loss or damages, consequential or otherwise, including but not limited to time, money, or goodwill, arising from the use, operation or modification of the data. In using these data, users further agree to indemnify, defend, and hold harmless City of Redmond for any and all liability of any nature arising out of or resulting from the lack of accuracy or correctness of the data, or the use of the data.

Please acknowledge the City of Redmond as a source when City of Redmond data are used in the preparation of reports, papers, publications, maps, and other products.

To ensure that appropriate documentation and data limitations are provided, these databases should not be redistributed to any other parties.

metainfo.metstdn: FGDC Content Standards for Digital Geospatial Metadata

altsys.altenc: Explicit elevation coordinate included with horizontal coordinates

attrdomv.udom: Sequential unique whole numbers that are automatically generated.

attr.attrdef: ArcGIS Editor Tracking field. System-generated username of who created the feature.
ArcGIS Editor Tracking field. System-generated username of who most recently modified the feature.
